all_files = mssparkutils.fs.ls(bronze_path)

all_file_names = [file.name for file in all_files]

print(all_file_names)

from delta.tables import DeltaTable

processed_table_exists = DeltaTable.isDeltaTable(
    spark,
    processed_files_path

from pyspark.sql.types import *

if not processed_table_exists:

    schema = StructType([
        StructField("file_name", StringType(), True),
        StructField("processed_time", TimestampType(), True)
    ])

    empty_df = spark.createDataFrame([], schema)

    (
        empty_df.write
        .format("delta")
        .mode("overwrite")
        .save(processed_files_path)
    )

    processed_files = []

else:

    processed_df = spark.read.format("delta").load(processed_files_path)

    processed_files = [
        row.file_name
        for row in processed_df.collect()

from notebookutils import mssparkutils

new_files = list(set(all_file_names) - set(processed_files))

print(new_files)

if len(new_files) == 0:
    print("No new files found")
    mssparkutils.notebook.exit("No new files to process")

from pyspark.sql.functions import *

new_file_paths = [
    bronze_path + file_name
    for file_name in new_files
]

df_new = spark.read.parquet(*new_file_paths)

df_new.show()

from pyspark.sql.functions import col, to_date, year, month, date_format

df_new = (
    df_new
    .withColumn("txn_date", to_date(col("date")))
    .withColumn("txn_year", year(col("date")))
    .withColumn("txn_month_name", date_format(col("date"), "MMMM"))
    .withColumn("silver_load_time", current_timestamp())
)

from delta.tables import *

if DeltaTable.isDeltaTable(spark, silver_path):

    silver_tbl = DeltaTable.forPath(spark, silver_path)

    (
        silver_tbl.alias("t")
        .merge(
            df_new.alias("s"),
            "t.transaction_id = s.transaction_id"
        )
        .whenMatchedUpdateAll()
        .whenNotMatchedInsertAll()
        .execute()
    )

else:

    (
        df_new.write
        .format("delta")
        .partitionBy("txn_year","txn_month_name")
        .mode("overwrite")
        .save(silver_path)

from pyspark.sql import Row
from pyspark.sql.functions import current_timestamp

processed_rows = [
    Row(file_name=file_name)
    for file_name in new_files
]

processed_new_df = spark.createDataFrame(processed_rows)

processed_new_df = processed_new_df.withColumn(
    "processed_time",
    current_timestamp()
)

(
    processed_new_df.write
    .format("delta")
    .mode("append")
    .save(processed_files_path)
